creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
Found it, please close the PR:

Fixed it by doing this:

rm /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/Compress/Zlib.pm
(this was also an upgrade from fbsd 5.5 to fbsd 6.2.  not sure who
should be in charge of removing that file, ports, Zlib maintainer ;-) or
stable.
